records.m_Talk_ENG: It's over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You are much stronger than what I saw in the memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You are much stronger than what I saw in the memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You are much stronger than what I saw in the memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this the power you received <color=#ffd34c>in return for your fate</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this the power you received <color=#ffd34c>in return for your fate</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this the power you received <color=#ffd34c>in return for your fate</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, nothing changes even if you possess Nagapasha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, nothing changes even if you possess Nagapasha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, nothing changes even if you possess Nagapasha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already know what you are after.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already know what you are after.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already know what you are after.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it the activation of my Unique Gear, the <color=#ffd34c>Dimension Anchor</color> that you have in your hands?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it the activation of my Unique Gear, the <color=#ffd34c>Dimension Anchor</color> that you have in your hands?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it the activation of my Unique Gear, the <color=#ffd34c>Dimension Anchor</color> that you have in your hands?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Dimension Anchor is a weapon that cannot be started without Nagapasha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Dimension Anchor is a weapon that cannot be started without Nagapasha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Dimension Anchor is a weapon that cannot be started without Nagapasha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as you may know, our division's gear requires a <color=#ffd34c>mantra code</color> and a <color=#ffd34c>biometric authentication code</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as you may know, our division's gear requires a <color=#ffd34c>mantra code</color> and a <color=#ffd34c>biometric authentication code</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as you may know, our division's gear requires a <color=#ffd34c>mantra code</color> and a <color=#ffd34c>biometric authentication code</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you know this all too well, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you know this all too well, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you know this all too well, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...! My Unique Gear is...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...! My Unique Gear is...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...! My Unique Gear is...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take it. It's the Dimension Anchor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take it. It's the Dimension Anchor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take it. It's the Dimension Anchor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? B-but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? B-but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? B-but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This doesn't look good. I feel that my end is near.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This doesn't look good. I feel that my end is near.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This doesn't look good. I feel that my end is near.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't even recall your name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't even recall your name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't even recall your name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I leave it up to you, nameless wind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I leave it up to you, nameless wind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I leave it up to you, nameless wind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the guiding sun. And for all our comrades who fell purifying the evil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the guiding sun. And for all our comrades who fell purifying the evil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the guiding sun. And for all our comrades who fell purifying the evil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Purify Varunastra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Purify Varunastra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Purify Varunastra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... even if I know the mantra code, it's useless if the biometric authentication code doesn't match.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... even if I know the mantra code, it's useless if the biometric authentication code doesn't match.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... even if I know the mantra code, it's useless if the biometric authentication code doesn't match.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about that. You will find a way when the time comes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about that. You will find a way when the time comes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about that. You will find a way when the time comes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sun gives light to those who wish to go forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sun gives light to those who wish to go forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sun gives light to those who wish to go forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Unique Gear in your hands is nothing but meaningless metal junk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Unique Gear in your hands is nothing but meaningless metal junk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Unique Gear in your hands is nothing but meaningless metal junk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, give up and accept the reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, give up and accept the reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, give up and accept the reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI knew.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vI knew.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI knew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew well enough and that's why I can't give up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew well enough and that's why I can't give up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew well enough and that's why I can't give up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have accepted reality, so I won't give up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have accepted reality, so I won't give up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have accepted reality, so I won't give up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stopping here won't change anything. For what we only have to offer is our lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stopping here won't change anything. For what we only have to offer is our lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stopping here won't change anything. For what we only have to offer is our lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I must go forth. Varunastra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I must go forth. Varunastra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I must go forth. Varunastra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will regret this moment after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will regret this moment after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will regret this moment after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My father, he would definitely do this, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My father, he would definitely do this, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My father, he would definitely do this, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. He trusted us and never gave up. I'm sure he'll be proud.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. He trusted us and never gave up. I'm sure he'll be proud.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. He trusted us and never gave up. I'm sure he'll be proud.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Asha. It's time to end it all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Asha. It's time to end it all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Asha. It's time to end it all.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But the problem is that Varunastra's insides have changed again. What should we do
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But the problem is that Varunastra's insides have changed again. What should we do
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But the problem is that Varunastra's insides have changed again. What should we do
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? M-Miss Wind! Look at this! The compass...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? M-Miss Wind! Look at this! The compass...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? M-Miss Wind! Look at this! The compass...!
